messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Write a Python script using python-pptx to generate an 11-slide creative dynamic presentation for media & entertainment partners showcasing upcoming content slate. The output file must be named "media_content_slate.pptx" and all content should be in Spanish. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping to fetch data; use hardcoded sample data only. When adding charts, you must explicitly use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, implement defensive programming by ensuring that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
import os

# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

BG_NAVY = "#0B1426"
BG_DARK_SLAKE = "#1A2744"
ACCENT_GOLD = "#FFD700"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#E8ECF1"
MUTED_BLUE = "#3A7CA5"
CARD_BG = "#1E3056"
CARD_BORDER = "#2A4A7B"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = ["Arial", "Malgun Gothic"]


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=ACCENT_GOLD):
    bar_width = Inches(0.4)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.98),
                             Inches(3), bar_height + Inches(0.1),
                             label_text.upper(), font_size=11, bold=True,
                             color_hex=hex_to_rgb(accent_color))


def add_footer(slide, text="MEDIA & ENTRETENIMIENTO | CONFIDENCIAL", font_size=8):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), Inches(12), Inches(0.35),
                 text, font_size=font_size, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path=None, placeholder_text=""):
    if path and os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_DARK_SLAKE)
        line = ph.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BORDER)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
        line.dash_style = None  # no dash pattern; solid border only
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15),
                     width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3),
                     placeholder_text or "PLACEHOLDER", font_size=9, bold=True,
                     color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.2),
                 "PRESENTACIÓN DE CONTENIDO", font_size=48, bold=True,
                 color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                 "Slate de Contenido para Socios Estratégicos", font_size=24, bold=False,
                 color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(4.1),
                                 Inches(2.3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "2025 — 2026", font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, text="MEDIA & ENTRETENIMIENTO | CONFIDENCIAL")


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "AGENDA"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(36)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "AGENDA", font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    items = [
        ("01", "Visión General del Contenido"),
        ("02", "Catálogo de Películas"),
        ("03", "Series de Televisión"),
        ("04", "Estrategia de Distribución"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.0)
    gap = Inches(0.2)

    for i, (num, desc) in enumerate(items):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + col * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * (card_h + gap)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5),
                     num, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.1), y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(1.4), Inches(0.5),
                     desc, font_size=16, color_hex=WHITE)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_content_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "VISTA GENERAL DEL CONTENIDO"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "VISTA GENERAL DEL CONTENIDO", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    stats = [
        ("47", "Títulos Totales"),
        ("12", "Películas"),
        ("8", "Series TV"),
        ("27", "Contenido Digital"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(stats):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + col * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4) + row * (card_h + gap)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0),
                     num, font_size=48, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5),
                     label, font_size=14, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_film_slate_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "CATÁLOGO DE PELÍCULAS"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "CATÁLOGO DE PELÍCULAS", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    films = [
        ("Horizonte Perdido", "Drama / Aventura", "2025"),
        ("Código Rojo", "Acción / Thriller", "2025"),
        ("Ecos del Silencio", "Suspenso / Misterio", "2026"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(4.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    for i, (title, genre, year) in enumerate(films):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.3),
                                 card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(2.5))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(3.0), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5),
                     title, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE)
        tag = add_card(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(3.6), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.35))
        tag.fill.solid()
        tag.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_BLUE)
        tag.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(3.62), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.35),
                     genre, font_size=10, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(4.1), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     year, font_size=12, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_tv_series_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "SERIES DE TELEVISIÓN"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "SERIES DE TELEVISIÓN", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    series = [
        ("La Casa del Lago", "Drama Familiar", "8 Episodios", "⭐ 9.1"),
        ("Noches de Ciudad", "Romance / Comedia", "12 Episodios", "⭐ 8.7"),
        ("El Último Testigo", "Crimen / Thriller", "6 Episodios", "⭐ 9.4"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(4.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    for i, (title, genre, eps, rating) in enumerate(series):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.3),
                                 card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(2.5))
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(3.0), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5),
                     title, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(3.6), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     genre, font_size=12, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(4.0), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     eps, font_size=12, color_hex=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(4.35), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     rating, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_streaming_focus_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "ENFOQUE DE STREAMING"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "ENFOQUE DE STREAMING", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    platforms = [
        ("Netflix", "18 Títulos", "4.2M Suscriptores"),
        ("Amazon Prime", "15 Títulos", "3.1M Suscriptores"),
        ("Disney+", "14 Títulos", "2.8M Suscriptores"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    for i, (name, titles, subs) in enumerate(platforms):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.3),
                                      Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        icon.fill.solid()
        icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        icon.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.35), card_w - Inches(1.5), Inches(0.6),
                     name, font_size=20, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.4), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     titles, font_size=16, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(2.0), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     subs, font_size=14, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_viewership_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "PROYECCIÓN DE AUDIENCIA"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "PROYECCIÓN DE AUDIENCIA", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Q1 2025', 'Q2 2025', 'Q3 2025', 'Q4 2025']
    chart_data.add_series('Originals', (850, 920, 1050, 1180))
    chart_data.add_series('Licensed', (620, 640, 670, 700))
    chart_data.add_series('Acquisitions', (300, 350, 400, 450))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.8), Inches(1.2), Inches(11.5), Inches(5.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    series_list = list(chart.series)
    for i, series in enumerate(series_list):
        series.format.fill.solid()
        colors = [hex_to_rgb("#FFD700"), hex_to_rgb("#3A7CA5"), hex_to_rgb("#E8ECF1")]
        if i < len(colors):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    add_footer(slide)


def build_distribution_strategy_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "ESTRATEGIA DE DISTRIBUCIÓN"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "ESTRATEGIA DE DISTRIBUCIÓN", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    channels = [
        ("Cine", "Estrenos en salas seleccionadas"),
        ("Streaming", "Plataformas OTT globales"),
        ("TV Lineal", "Emisión en canales premium"),
        ("VOD", "Alquiler y compra digital"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(channels):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CHEVRON, x + Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.5),
                                      Inches(1.2), Inches(1.2))
        icon.fill.solid()
        icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        icon.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.9), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5),
                     name, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(2.5), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.8),
                     desc, font_size=12, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_revenue_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "DISTRIBUCIÓN DE INGRESOS"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "DISTRIBUCIÓN DE INGRESOS", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Streaming', 'Licenciamiento', 'Cine', 'Merchandising']
    chart_data.add_series('Ingreso (%)', (42, 28, 18, 12))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(3.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.3), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    series_list = list(chart.series)
    for i, series in enumerate(series_list):
        series.format.fill.solid()
        colors = [hex_to_rgb("#FFD700"), hex_to_rgb("#3A7CA5"), hex_to_rgb("#E8ECF1"), hex_to_rgb("#2A4A7B")]
        if i < len(colors):
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    add_footer(slide)


def build_timeline_roadmap_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "HOJA DE RUTA 2025–2026"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "HOJA DE RUTA 2025–2026", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Lanzamiento de catálogo"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Acuerdos internacionales"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Estrenos de verano"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Premios y festivales"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Nuevas producciones"),
    ]

    line_y = Inches(3.8)
    total_width = Inches(11.5)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - total_width) / 2
    step = total_width / (len(milestones) - 1)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, start_x, line_y, total_width, Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BORDER)
    line.line.fill.background()

    for i, (quarter, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = start_x + i * step
        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x - Inches(0.15), line_y - Inches(0.15),
                                     Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        dot.fill.solid()
        dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        dot.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.8), line_y + Inches(0.4), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.35),
                     quarter, font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(1.2), line_y + Inches(0.8), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.6),
                     desc, font_size=11, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_contact_closing_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.0),
                 "GRACIAS", font_size=54, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.2),
                                 Inches(2.3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "¿Listos para crear juntos?", font_size=24, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    contact_items = [
        "contacto@mediapartners.com",
        "+34 91 123 4567",
        "www.mediapartners.com"
    ]
    for i, item in enumerate(contact_items):
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5) + i * Inches(0.4), Inches(10), Inches(0.35),
                     item, font_size=16, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, text="MEDIA & ENTRETENIMIENTO | CONFIDENCIAL")


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_content_overview_slide(prs)
    build_film_slate_slide(prs)
    build_tv_series_slide(prs)
    build_streaming_focus_slide(prs)
    build_viewership_chart_slide(prs)
    build_distribution_strategy_slide(prs)
    build_revenue_chart_slide(prs)
    build_timeline_roadmap_slide(prs)
    build_contact_closing_slide(prs)

    prs.save("media_content_slate.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
